findings: Multiple bulk-related backward and forward traffic features exhibit near-constant values with extremely low variance and cardinality, consistent with data collection or preprocessing artifacts.
Shortcut verification on 'Bwd Avg Bulk Rate' shows only weak shortcut evidence, suggesting these features do not strongly encode shortcut signals despite low diversity.
No local evidence of exact duplication or other structural irregularities was found within the bounded scope.
limitations: Analysis limited to partition-global scope and features explicitly referenced; no deeper semantic or cross-partition analysis performed.
